description: Alice requests a meeting with 'my boss'. With memory: resolves to Bob. Without memory: generic title.

memory_context.value: Alice's manager/boss, moved from the platform team

events.title: Quarterly Goals Meeting with Bob
events.reasoning: Alice needs to meet with her boss next Tuesday to discuss quarterly goals. Based on memory, Alice's boss is Bob. Scheduling for 1 hour as requested.
events.assumptions: Resolved 'my boss' to Bob based on known relationship. Using default morning slot since no specific time given.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 meeting with Bob (Alice's boss) for Tuesday.

events.title: Quarterly Goals Meeting
events.reasoning: Alice needs to meet with her boss next Tuesday to discuss quarterly goals. The boss's name is not specified. Scheduling for 1 hour as requested.
events.assumptions: Boss's identity unknown, creating event without specific attendee name. Using default morning slot.

mock_llm_response_no_memory.summary: Found 1 meeting for Tuesday to discuss quarterly goals.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'next Tuesday' resolves to 2026-02-24. Delta: title differs (resolved name 'Bob' vs generic), attendees_contain differs (non-empty ['Bob'] vs empty []).
